facebook.caption: 432 reviews. 4.5 stars. For a vegan restaurant on a beach island. Nhà Hàng Chay NẤM is doing something right. Plant-based done properly in Phú Quốc, at 13 Đường Nguyễn Trãi. No fish sauce shortcuts. No compromises. Whether you're fully vegan or just need a break from seafood, this place delivers. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
